evidence.text: Agentic AI Security Bootcamp is a hands-on, research-driven training environment for analysing, attacking, and securing autonomous AI systems. The repository provides structured labs, adversarial evaluation frameworks, and red-teaming exercises covering multi-agent observability, prompt injection..
